semantic_models.name: semantic_glucose_register
semantic_models.description: A semantic model for the glucose_register table

dimensions.name: timestamp_day
dimensions.description: The timestamp when the record was recorded

dimensions.name: timestamp_hour
dimensions.description: The timestamp when the record was recorded

dimensions.name: sensor_scan
dimensions.description: Indicates whether the glucose value was obtained through a sensor scan (1) or not (0)

semantic_models.name: semantic_strava_activities
semantic_models.description: A semantic model for the strava_activities table

measures.name: distance_m_sum
measures.description: The total distance covered during the activity (in meters)

dimensions.name: start_date_local
dimensions.description: The local start date and time of the activity

semantic_models.name: semantic_food
semantic_models.description: A semantic model for the food table

measures.name: weight_grams_sum
measures.description: The total weight of the food items consumed (in grams)

measures.name: weight_grams_average
measures.description: The average weight of the food items consumed (in grams)

measures.name: carbohydrate_weight_grams_sum
measures.description: The total weight of carbohydrates consumed (in grams)

measures.name: carbohydrate_weight_grams_average
measures.description: The average weight of carbohydrates consumed (in grams)

dimensions.name: food_type
dimensions.description: The type of the food item

dimensions.name: absorption_type
dimensions.description: The type of absorption (e.g., fast, slow)

dimensions.name: glycemic_index
dimensions.description: The glycemic index of the food item
